# Platform

## Getting Started

### macOS

```bash
brew install node
```

### Linux

```bash
apt-get install nodejs
```

### Windows

Download from the [Node.js website](https://nodejs.org).

### After cloning

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Running

### In production mode

```bash
npm run serve
```

### In staging mode

```bash
npm run serve --env staging
```

### Monitoring

This section has no commands.
